name: 8bitgo
description: Phaser-powered 8bit iOS game starter with pixel styling, IAP, and release automation.

scripts.build:web: npm run validate:billing && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.ios:prepare: npm run build:web && node scripts/ensure-ios-platform.mjs && npx cap sync ios && npm run verify:ios-bundle
scripts.ios:open: npm run ios:prepare && npx cap open ios
scripts.ios:verify: npm run ios:prepare && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
